thesis: MORNING window (11:00-ET slot) — refining the plan for TODAY's regular session already IN PROGRESS, snapshot.nextSessionDate = 2026-07-23, authored intraday on the deterministic snapshot asOf 2026-07-23T14:48:22.093Z (~10:48 ET Thursday 7/23, marketClosed=false, market OPEN, 285 cached series, bars updated 14:48:17.735Z). WHAT CHANGED vs the 07:18 ET pre-market run: the open did NOT hold — it REJECTED. This is the material development that changes today's plan. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is still intact on completed bars, but today's rejection is TECH-LED and the crack has now reached the INDEX itself — SPY has lost its 50-day intraday and the leadership has flipped defensive. Prices (LIVE INTRADAY, today's bar is still forming and NOT settled): SPY 738.95 is now -0.69% BELOW its 50-day (~744.1) — down ~-1.13% from the settled 7/22 close (747.41) and -2.46% off the ATH (~757.6); it stays bull-stacked on the longer MAs (+6.31% over its 200-day ~694.9, mom126/252 +8.39%/+18.81%) but the 50-day it confirmed on the 7/22 settled close has been given back intraday. QQQ 692.6 deepened its breakdown to -3.58% below its 50-day (~718.3, mom5 -1.89, still TANGLED). VGT 114.58 tangled (-1.65% below its 50-day). MSFT 380 fell further to -4.89% below its 50-day (~399.5), bear-stacked, mom63 -12.03. THE ONE RELATIVE HOLD: SPMO 150.18 is essentially flat on the day (bull MA-stack 20>50>200, mom5 +3.37, +17.46% over its 200-day) but still sits right at its 50-day (-0.22%) — broad momentum held while tech beta was sold, consistent with the defensive rotation. VOL: VIX firmed to 19.11 (band 19.1, +1.44 vs the pre-market 17.67, +2.47 vs the 16.64 after-hours low) — it has now PUSHED INTO the 19-20 zone the prior run flagged as its calm-regime falsifier, though still under the 3-point single-reference regime-change threshold measured from 17.67. The calm regime is being TESTED, not yet decisively broken. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars: ~10 (7/09->7/22) — 7 directly confirmed (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17) plus 7/20/7/21/7/22 settled via the recentHistory date-roll chain; today 7/23 has OPENED but has NOT closed — its bar is forming, this rejection is LIVE INTRADAY tape, NOT a completed bar and NOT counted; intraday reruns are not counted. ROTATION (refreshed THIS run): the owning sector RRG (sector-research-lab, asOf 2026-07-23T14:48:22Z) reads 'Rotate toward XLE as XLV weakens'. Leadership has gone DEFENSIVE/ENERGY: XLE Leading and BOARD-BEST (rsMom 103.25, rsRatio 101.47, accel +2.65, into, +16.86% over its 200-day) alongside rate-sensitive/defensive leaders XLRE (rsMom 101.71, accel +2.43, into), XLU (rsMom 101.78, accel +1.87, into), XLI (rsMom 101.05, accel +1.61, into) and XLP Improving into (rsMom 101.17, accel +2.01), versus XLK now LAGGING (rsMom 99.61<100, accel +0.08 — softened from 'Basing up' to Lagging this run), XLV Weakening (accel -1.3, out), XLF Peaking (out). Semis rolled over: SOXX flipped to Weakening / rotation OUT (rsMom 99.83<100, accel +0.53, rsMom1m -9.25, above-50 3/12, up-momentum 3/12) — the stretched leader is now confirming the tape's risk-off turn. MAGS Lagging (1/7 bull-stacked, ma200Dist -2.41). GLOBAL/REAL-ASSETS (owning tools refreshed today 13:30Z): global-rotation-lab is Asia/global-led on a local-currency (FX-headwind) basis — EWS Singapore 77.6 leads vs ACWI, EWC Canada next, EWT Taiwan (rel126 +40); real-assets-lab shows NO precious-metal haven bid (GLD 14.4 washed further, SLV 0, BTC 41.4 mixed) but a clear ENERGY/COMMODITY lead (PDBC 71 Uptrend, commodity breadth 75) confirming the XLE rotation; etf-momentum-lab has SPMO leading the 6M balanced ranking (28.2%, 13 scored). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, the intraday pin/magnet, option-implied moves, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path (carried ~53.5% hold / ~46.5% hike) are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing any gamma trade, vol-term claim, or Fed positioning. PLAN from here into the close: HOLD the longer-term structure but do NOT add index beta while SPY is intraday below its 50-day and QQQ is breaking down (require a confirmed daily CLOSE to judge the 50-day, not the intraday tick); TRIM stretched tech/semis beta (SOXX now Weakening/out, QQQ/VGT below their 50-days) into any bounce; ROTATE toward the confirmed defensive/energy Leading 'into' cluster (XLE board-best and commodity-confirmed, plus XLU/XLRE/XLP/XLI) funded from weakening healthcare/tech; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT deeper below its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry the small defined-risk hedge toward 7/29 — VIX at 19.11 has reached the flag zone, making the hedge MORE justified though the calm regime is not yet broken — after re-verifying the live path; stay OUT of precious-metal havens (GLD 14.4 / SLV 0).
